languages.text: {n}Дрожащие руки смыкаются на груди — юноша улыбается.{/n} "Чувствую... Бьется... Лорд-капитан... верит? Десятый сортировочный... не посрамить! Я за... заступлю на смену, не предам ди-династию!"

{n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"
languages.original_text: {n}Дрожащие руки смыкаются на груди — юноша улыбается.{/n} "Чувствую... Бьется... Лорд-капитан... верит? Десятый сортировочный... не посрамить! Я за... заступлю на смену, не предам ди-династию!"

traits.locale_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

{n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

{n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

{n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

languages.text: {n}彼は震える手を胸に抱き、微笑む。{/n}「あなたは正しい、感じられる... 艦長は私を信じているのか？ ソートハブ10に恥を被らせない。私は自分と、この船にいる全員を信じます！そして、あなたも信じます、艦長！」
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "You're right, I can feel it... The Lord Captain believes in me? I won't bring shame to Sorting Hub 10. I will believe in myself, and in every person on this ship! And I'll believe in you too, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: 彼は震える手を胸に抱き、微笑む。「あなたは正しい、感じられる... 艦長は私を信じているのか？ ソートハブ10に恥を被らせない。私は自分と、この船にいる全員を信じます！そして、あなたも信じます、艦長！」

languages.text: {n}他双手颤抖地捂住胸口，露出微笑。{/n}“我能感觉到……它在挣扎……舰长大人……相信吗？我不会给……10号分拣站丢脸！我会……守好这班岗，我不会背叛王朝！”
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}他双手颤抖地捂住胸口，露出微笑。{/n}“我能感觉到……它在挣扎……舰长大人……相信吗？我不会给……10号分拣站丢脸！我会……守好这班岗，我不会背叛王朝！”

languages.text: {n}Il porte ses mains tremblantes à sa poitrine et sourit.{/n} « Je le sens... se débattre... {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} croit en moi ? La zone de tri numéro 10... Je ne lui ferai pas honte ! Je vais faire mon quart, je ne trahirai pas la d-dynastie ! »
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Il porte ses mains tremblantes à sa poitrine et sourit.{/n} « Je le sens... se débattre... {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} croit en moi ? La zone de tri numéro 10... Je ne lui ferai pas honte ! Je vais faire mon quart, je ne trahirai pas la d-dynastie ! »

languages.text: {n}Une sus manos temblorosas sobre su pecho y sonríe.{/n} «Puedo sentirlo... luchando... ¿{mf|El|La} Lord Capitán... cree? No llevaré desgracia... nexo de clasificación 10. Termi... naré mi turno, ¡no fallaré a la di... dinastía!».
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Une sus manos temblorosas sobre su pecho y sonríe.{/n} «Puedo sentirlo... luchando... ¿{mf|El|La} Lord Capitán... cree? No llevaré desgracia... nexo de clasificación 10. Termi... naré mi turno, ¡no fallaré a la di... dinastía!».

languages.text: {n}Titreyen ellerini göğsünde kavuşturup gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hissedebiliyorum... Mücadele ediyor... Lord Kaptan... İnanıyor mu? 10. Tasnif Merkezi... Yüzünüzü kara çıkarmayacağım! Vardiyamda ça... Çalışacağım, ha... Hanedanlığa ihanet etmeyeceğim!"
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Titreyen ellerini göğsünde kavuşturup gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hissedebiliyorum... Mücadele ediyor... Lord Kaptan... İnanıyor mu? 10. Tasnif Merkezi... Yüzünüzü kara çıkarmayacağım! Vardiyamda ça... Çalışacağım, ha... Hanedanlığa ihanet etmeyeceğim!"

languages.text: {n}Er presst lächelnd seine zitternden Hände auf seine Brust.{/n} "Ich fühle es ... kämpfen ... Der Lord Captain ... glaubt? Sortierstation 10 ... Ich werde keine Schande über sie bringen. Ich w... werde meine Schicht beenden und die Dy-Dynastie nicht verraten!"
languages.original_text: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Er presst lächelnd seine zitternden Hände auf seine Brust.{/n} "Ich fühle es ... kämpfen ... Der Lord Captain ... glaubt? Sortierstation 10 ... Ich werde keine Schande über sie bringen. Ich w... werde meine Schicht beenden und die Dy-Dynastie nicht verraten!"
